brand_identity.name: Logi3A Soluções
brand_identity.sub_branding: Escola Estadual Professora Elídia Tedesco de Oliveira
brand_identity.theme_strategy: Hybrid: Light Mode Default (Classroom optimized) with High-Contrast Dark Mode option

usage_rules: Use 'Chivo' or 'JetBrains Mono' for all headings and data values (numbers).
Use 'Inter' for long-form text and instructions.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for codes (QR content, Barcode numbers) to ensure character alignment.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.scanner_trigger: h-24 w-24 rounded-full bg-primary border-4 border-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse hover:animate-none hover:scale-110 transition-transform

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition-all duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

scanner_ui.overlay: absolute inset-0 border-2 border-primary/50 bg-black/10 z-10
scanner_ui.viewfinder: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-64 h-64 border-4 border-primary rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_0_9999px_rgba(0,0,0,0.7)]

animations.scan_line: animate-[scan_2s_ease-in-out_infinite] bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-primary/50 to-transparent w-full h-1 absolute top-0

images.placeholder_strategy: Use CSS patterns or lucide-react icons in large sizes for empty states. Do not use external image URLs unless necessary.

logos.school: Use text-based logo or simple SVG icon

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text. Use 'text-foreground' on 'bg-background'.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not center align the entire app container.
Every interaction needs feedback (visual or auditory).
Marketing pages use custom HTML/Tailwind; App pages use Shadcn components.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo' or 'JetBrains Mono'.
Blue (#0052CC) is the primary color. Black (#0F172A) is the secondary/text color.

implementation_steps.action: Install required fonts (Chivo, JetBrains Mono) and icons (lucide-react).
Update tailwind.config.js with the defined color palette and font families.
Customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input) to match the 'Performance Pro' archetype.
Build the 'Bento' grid layout for the Dashboard and the 'Viewfinder' layout for the Scanner.
